nasb.text: For by wise guidance you will wage war, And in abundance of counselors there is victory.

esv.text: for by wise guidance you can wage your war, and in abundance of counselors there is victory.

cnv.text: 你要憑著智謀去作戰； 謀士眾多，就可得勝。

ccb.text: 出征打仗，要凭智谋； 谋士众多，胜券在握。

csbs.text: 因为你作战，要靠指引； 谋士众多，就可得胜。
